Chapter 1
1.1 Overview
Machine learning models are increasingly deployed in production environments where reliability and latency are critical. Ensuring that models behave predictably under distribution shift requires comprehensive monitoring and evaluation infrastructure. This document outlines the requirements for a production ML observability platform.
